answers: Project management: planning, executing, and closing projects. Key: scope, timeline, budget, quality, and team coordination.
PM tools: Jira (tech teams), Trello (simple), Asana (versatile), Monday.com (visual), and Microsoft Project (enterprise).
Basics: define scope, create WBS (work breakdown), estimate timeline, assign resources, track progress, manage risks.
Tips: start with clear goals, communicate often, track milestones, manage scope creep, and do retrospectives after completion.
